name: Athletic Edge Sports & Fitness
description: Athletic Edge Sports & Fitness is a place to play pickleball in Washington, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Bobby Andrews Recreation Center
description: Bobby Andrews Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Washington, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Washington Yacht & Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Washington Yacht & Country Club in Washington, NC! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts can be reserved.
